packetPreviewSections.evidence-boundary: Dry-run, mock, checklist, and report-only material only; not real UX evidence.
packetPreviewSections.approval-checklist-summary: Checklist is readable and separate from authorization.
packetPreviewSections.rollback-or-restore-plan: Restore notes name templates and reviewer.
packetPreviewSections.execution-boundary: No authorization or execution approval is granted.
packetPreviewSections.runner-gate-reminder: Current reusable runner is enough for report-only validation.
